MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Plaintiff Nicolas Franchet's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Michael A. Filoromo is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Michael A. Filoromo may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Proposed order submitted during the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
